Prefect Karukia:
The Mystic Wine is very dangerous. It can cause severe side effects.
It usually takes Orcs from our tribe a long time to prepare to use. We start with a few drops then gradually increase the dosage to get used to the side effects.
Unfortunately, we don't have time for that now. That's why I need to warn you.
Even if you have no problems with your health, you will still feel the side effects. This will make the trial even harder.
